headline: Kroger Memorial Day hours and specials
summary: Memorial Day, which always falls on the last Monday in May, is a day when America salutes its fallen heroes, honoring service members who died in service to their country. Kroger is just one of a handful of businesses that goes beyond offering sales on hot dogs, burgers and beer. The company also ...

headline: 3 Large-Cap Stocks with Questionable Fundamentals
summary: Large-cap stocks have the power to shape entire industries thanks to their size and widespread influence. With such vast footprints, however, finding new areas for growth is much harder than for smaller, more agile players.
